name: Baked Tuna Chow Mein Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 1-1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, melt 2 tablespoons butter in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
2. Add celery, onion, and green pepper to the melted butter. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Combine remaining ingredients except 1/3 cup chow mein noodles with vegetables. Blend well. Top with 1/3 cup of chow mein noodles. Heat in Microwave Oven, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until sauce bubbles.
